title: Quantitative analysis of myofiber type composition in skeletal muscles
author: Tooba Abbassi-Daloii
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
In this pre-print, we present the step-by-step protocol for myofiber immunostaining and quantitative myofiber type composition analysis. All the image processing macros and R scripts are publically available on GitHub: 
https://github.com/tabbassidaloii/ImageProcessing/tree/main/MyofiberTyping.
steps_raw:
In this pre-print, we present the step-by-step protocol for myofiber immunostaining and quantitative myofiber type composition analysis. All the image processing macros and R scripts are publically available on GitHub: 
https://github.com/tabbassidaloii/ImageProcessing/tree/main/MyofiberTyping.
